research_papers.title: Machine Learning Approaches for Early Detection of Diabetic Retinopathy
research_papers.abstract: This study evaluates deep learning models for automated detection of diabetic retinopathy from retinal fundus photographs. A convolutional neural network achieved 96.7% accuracy in classifying retinal images, demonstrating potential for screening applications.

research_papers.title: Telemedicine Interventions for Hypertension Management in Rural Populations
research_papers.abstract: A randomized controlled trial examining the effectiveness of telemedicine-based hypertension management in rural communities. Patients receiving telemedicine care showed significantly better blood pressure control compared to standard care.

research_papers.title: Personalized Medicine in Asthma: Genetic Predictors of Treatment Response
research_papers.abstract: This study identifies genetic variants associated with differential response to inhaled corticosteroids in asthma patients. Findings suggest potential for genetic testing to guide personalized asthma treatment.

clinical_trials.title: AI-Assisted Early Detection of Osteoarthritis Progression
clinical_trials.intervention: Machine learning analysis of X-ray images

clinical_trials.title: Digital Therapeutics for Type 2 Diabetes Management
clinical_trials.eligibility: Adults with Type 2 Diabetes and HbA1c 7.5-10.0%
